analyst_briefing: All 10 conflicts remain Contested baselines (week_count <=2, null medians across I1-I6), blocking formal deviation scoring; core principle limits alerts to inferred shifts from notes/weekly data. Sudan Civil War generates strongest early-warning: multi-front I2 expansion (Blue Nile/Damazin, Kordofan airstrikes), I4 economic warfare (gold mines), I6 4M+ displacement exceed year-4 norms per Tier 1 sources (ICG/ACLED), warranting Worsening trajectory upgrade. Russia-Ukraine I2 post-Easter strikes + advances signal diplomatic positioning deviation. Trajectory changes recommended: Sudan/Israel-Lebanon/Russia-Ukraine/Korea to explicit Worsening. F4 flags maintained (Gaza/DRC/Iran I5 fragile talks); no F4 removals or new flags. Roster: Include India-Pakistan (Op Sindoor criteria met). Cross-flags: GMM/ERM HIGH on Sudan economic/displacement cascades. Habituation absent; no de-escalations below implied baselines. Focus deviation over level: Sudan anomalous multi-domain spikes dominate familiar high-intensity theatres (Iran RED-band stable).
